data.name: WEIGHING_TICKET_CANCEL_SERVICE_NOT_COMPLETE_MSG
data.value: Weighing receipts can only be cancelled if the status is "complete".

data.name: OWNERSHIP_TRANSFER_DESTINATION_BALANCE
data.value: The balance of the destination storage address is insufficient to cancel the transaction.

data.name: OWNERSHIP_TRANSFER_ORIGIN_BALANCE
data.value: The balance of the origin storage address is insufficient to confirm the transaction.

data.name: EXCEPTION_00001
data.value: The customer listed on the ticket is different from the customer listed in the storage address

data.name: EXCEPTION_00002
data.value: The product listed on the ticket is different from the product listed in the storage address.

data.name: EXCEPTION_00003
data.value: The total shipped exceeds the available balance in the storage address.

data.name: EXCEPTION_00005
data.value: Only pending transactions can be confirmed.

data.name: EXCEPTION_00006
data.value: The quantity shipped exceeds the available stock in the warehouse.
